basic_details.job_title: NIT Manipur Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Manipur (NIT Manipur)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Manipur (NIT Manipur) has published the Assistant Professor (Grade-II, Level-10) Recruitment Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 7 Assistant Professor (Grade-II, Level-10) positions. Candidates holding a Ph.D. in the relevant/ equivalent discipline along with first class in all their preceding degrees are eligible to apply online through the official NIT Manipur website. The online application process will remain open until 31 July 2026. Candidates can access the official notification PDF and apply online using the links provided below.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D in the relevant/equivalent discipline along with first class in all their preceding degrees
qualification.details: Ph.D in the relevant/equivalent discipline along with first class in all their preceding degrees.

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications Written Test Seminar Presentation Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Manipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Manipur Assistant Professor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Manipur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIT Manipur Assistant Professor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Manipur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Manipur Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Manipur Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application form is 31 July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in the relevant or equivalent discipline, along with first-class marks in all preceding academic degrees.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for the Assistant Professor (Grade-II, Level-10) post in NIT Manipur.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General and OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is 2500.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for Women candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, the application fee for Women candidates is 1000.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of applications, followed by a written test, seminar presentation, and an interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary scale for the Assistant Professor (Grade-II) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be appointed at Level-10 of the pay matrix.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the starting date for online applications?
faq.answer: The online application portal opens on 07 July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Does NIT Manipur offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation is not explicitly detailed here; please refer to the official notification for specific details.
